case_title: PATEL, B. K. vs. STOWERS, GREG

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, B. K. AS TO DEFENDANT STOWERS, GREG SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT STOWERS, GREG
